export const intervalProvider = { setInterval(handler, timeout, ...args) { const { delegate } = intervalProvider; if (delegate === null || delegate === void 0 ? void 0 : delegate.setInterval) { return delegate.setInterval(handler, timeout, ...args); } return setInterval(handler, timeout, ...args); }, clearInterval(handle) { const { delegate } = intervalProvider; return ((delegate === null || delegate === void 0 ? void 0 : delegate.clearInterval) || clearInterval)(handle); }, delegate: undefined, }; //# sourceMappingURL=intervalProvider.js.map
